scripts.build: node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/_worker.js --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:node:* --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --minify-syntax --minify-whitespace && mkdir -p dist/static && cp -r public/static/. dist/static/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name india-gully --branch main
